notes: Version 4.1.3 panel. Restores the one-click Tunnel/Relay setup wizard (generate key, ready-to-paste Google Apps Script, verify) and drops Backend mode from the UI (self-hosting is now Nova Server). Fixes: a specific clean-IP pool port (for example 443) now applies and sticks, and the 0-RTT toggle now applies and reflects its real state. Matches worker V4.1.3.
